# 🎯 Release: Project Skeleton & CI Setup (`v0.0.0`)

{{RELEASE_METADATA}}

## 📌 Summary
This release officially establishes the strict CI/CD architecture and Maven foundation for the **Playwright Java Hybrid Automation Framework** in the `main` branch. It securely locks in the GitHub Actions, repository rules, and bash automation scripts required to maintain enterprise-grade code quality.

## 🛠 Key Changes
- [x] Initialized Maven project (`pom.xml`) with Java 17 minimums.
- [x] Integrated `pom-validator.sh` (v2.0) with HTML reporting.
- [x] Configured strict GitHub Actions pipelines (`main-ci.yml`, `feature-pr.yml`, `release-pr.yml`).
- [x] Set up automated PR, Milestone, and Issue management scripts.
- [x] Established basic repository directory layout.

## ✅ Quality Assurance
- Verified custom POM validation passes strict mode.
- Confirmed all GitHub Action runners execute successfully.
- Validated automation script syntax and execution permissions.

## 📝 Notes
This establishes the `v0.0.0` baseline. No testing dependencies (Playwright/TestNG) are included yet; they are slated for `v0.1.0`.

🟢 **Output**: Clean Maven project scaffold with robust CI/CD and validation scripts.
